\tzpentry{ID4700}{Text Magnetic Flux Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4700 introduces Text Magnetic Flux Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\\Box_g \\Phi_\\text{ac} = \\frac{1}{\\sqrt{-g}} \\partial_\\mu \\left(\\sqrt{-g} \\, g^{\\mu\\nu} \\partial_\\nu \\Phi_\\text{ac}\\right) = 0\n\\end{equation}
